violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the front and back of building, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the retail and walk-in cooler areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
Walk-in retail door gaskets (milk door) were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris: - Storage cabinets, - Cooler retail shelves, - Walk-in cooler storage shelves, - Microwave New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
Establishment is lacking a mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The floors (under retail shelves and walk-in cooler) and walls (walk-in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The following was observed in poor repair: - ceiling tiles with old water damage, - walk-in cooler walls with chipped paint and exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The ceiling tiles in the retail area is in poor repair(observed water stains). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
Observed mops being stored on 3 bay sink. Mops must be cleaned and dried in a sanitary manner. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The floors in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
